title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF CALLE GRAN CAPITAN IN THE CITY OF TACLOBAN TO JUSTICE NORBERTO ROMUALDEZ, SR. STREET.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2631 / 55 OG No. 39, 8272 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2578, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF CALLE GRAN CAPITAN IN THE CITY OF TACLOBAN TO JUSTICE NORBERTO ROMUALDEZ, SR. STREET.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Calle Gran Capitan in the City of Tacloban is hereby changed to Justice Norberto Romualdez, Sr. Street.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
